# Shwe Sin Shopkeeper App

- Build a clean, mobile-first Next.js App Router application for small shopkeepers.
- Keep the experience simple: add items with photo, name, amount, and price; search items quickly; show prices clearly.
- Support English and Burmese in the UI with a toggle.
- Favor readable UI on Android screens and keep actions easy to reach with one hand.
- Keep the app deployable on Vercel without additional backend services.
- Store inventory locally in the browser for the initial version unless a backend is explicitly requested.
